notes: Power management overhaul. The previous "light sleep" path kept the CPU and BLE running while pretending to be off — a device left idle overnight drained the pack. Now: a single 3-second hold on the BOOT button (was 4) puts the device into real deep sleep, and after 5 minutes of no motion and no phone connection the same auto-off path fires. Wake on motion or button only — no more periodic timer wake. Screen also dims to 10% after 60 s in the idle screen (full bright in any ride/countdown/summary state); touching the AMOLED or pressing the BOOT button restores full brightness for another 60 s. Calibration and max-lean reset are now BLE-only — the BOOT button no longer triggers them, since one-function-per-gesture is less error-prone.
